task:
Build a music collection in the Obsidian vault at /home/user/Documents/MusicVault.

1. Create folders: 'Artists', 'Albums', 'Playlists'.
2. Create 'Artists/Radiohead.md' with frontmatter `type: artist`, `genre: alternative rock`, body with heading 'Radiohead', description, links to [[OK Computer]] and [[Kid A]], and tags #artist #alternative-rock.
3. Create 'Artists/Daft Punk.md' with frontmatter `type: artist`, `genre: electronic`, body with heading 'Daft Punk', description, a link to [[Discovery]], and tags #artist #electronic.
4. Create 'Albums/OK Computer.md' with frontmatter `type: album`, `year: 1997`, `rating: 10`, body with heading 'OK Computer', description, a link to [[Radiohead]], a track list, and tags #album #alternative-rock.
5. Create 'Albums/Kid A.md' with frontmatter `type: album`, `year: 2000`, `rating: 9`, body with heading 'Kid A', description, a link to [[Radiohead]], a track list, and tags #album #experimental.
6. Create 'Albums/Discovery.md' with frontmatter `type: album`, `year: 2001`, `rating: 9`, body with heading 'Discovery', description, a link to [[Daft Punk]], a track list, and tags #album #electronic.
7. Create 'Playlists/Late Night Coding.md' with frontmatter `type: playlist`, body with heading 'Late Night Coding', description, links to [[OK Computer]], [[Kid A]], and [[Discovery]], and tags #playlist #coding #latenight.

verification.description: Late Night Coding links to OK Computer
Late Night Coding links to Kid A
Late Night Coding links to Discovery
